title: Console session titles: auto-title turns 1/2 + manual rename

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing: (1) remove category fallback title in console UI, (2) auto-title sessions on user turn 1 and 2 in shared chat runtime with manual-title lock in metadata, (3) add manual rename action in session header menu, (4) add focused Python/Jest coverage.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented session titling + manual rename:

- Added auto-title generation in shared console runtime for user turn 1 and 2 only.
- Auto-title reads `metadata.model.id` from trigger message, writes `ChatSession.name`, and records metadata (`title_source=auto`, `auto_title_turn`, `auto_title_message_id`).
- Added manual-title lock check (`title_source=manual`) to skip auto updates.
- Auto-title failures are now non-fatal to chat response processing.
- Added session rename UI action in conversation header menu with dialog + save flow; updates session metadata with `title_source=manual`.
- Removed category fallback from visible session title rendering; now uses explicit name or neutral `Session <id>`.

Verification:
- `pytest -q plexus/console/test_chat_runtime.py` (23 passed)
- `cd dashboard && npm test -- --runInBand components/ui/__tests__/conversation-viewer-session-routing.test.tsx components/ui/__tests__/conversation-viewer-streaming-updates.test.tsx` (pass)
